parameters.query:
-- Buscar o crear usuario por teléfono
INSERT INTO users (name, phone, status, role)
VALUES ('Usuario ' || '{{ $json.phone }}', '{{ $json.phone }}', 'unregistered', 'user')
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET phone = EXCLUDED.phone
RETURNING id, name, phone, role, status;

INSERT INTO messages (user_id, channel_message_id, message_type, raw_text, processing_status)
VALUES (
  {{ $('Buscar/Crear Usuario').first().json.id }},
  '{{ $('Parsear Payload WhatsApp').first().json.channelMessageId }}',
  'text',
  '{{ $('Parsear Payload WhatsApp').first().json.rawText.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'pending'
)
ON CONFLICT (channel_message_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;

parameters.name: messages

parameters.query:
-- Crear gasto si hay monto
{{ $json.shouldCreateExpense ? `
INSERT INTO expenses (
  user_id, message_id, category_id, amount,
  description, expense_date, status,
  capture_channel, confidence_score
)
SELECT
  ${$json.userId},
  ${$json.messageId},
  (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE name ILIKE '${($json.extracted.category_guess || 'Otros').replace(/'/g, "''")}' LIMIT 1),
  ${$json.extracted.amount || 0},
  ${$json.extracted.description ? `'${$json.extracted.description.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL'},
  ${$json.extracted.expense_date ? `'${$json.extracted.expense_date}'::DATE` : 'CURRENT_DATE'},
  '${$json.expenseStatus}',
  'whatsapp',
  ${$json.extracted.confidence_score || 0}
RETURNING id;
` : 'SELECT NULL AS id;' }}

-- Actualizar estado del mensaje
UPDATE messages
SET processing_status = '{{ $json.messageStatus }}',
    error_reason = {{ $json.messageStatus === 'error' ? `'${($json.extracted.confidence_reason || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}' ` : 'NULL' }},
    processed_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.messageId }};
